1.name: Hot Start
1.desc: Team with the highest score (starters only)

2.name: Look At These TDs
2.desc: Team with the most offensive touchdowns scored

3.name: Immaculate
3.desc: Team with the WR with the most receptions

4.name: Blackjack
4.desc: Team with a starter closest to 21 points without going over

6.name: Like A Boss
6.desc: Team with the biggest margin of victory

7.name: Rushmore
7.desc: Team with the RB with the most rushing yards

8.name: Stay On Target
8.desc: Team closest to their projected point total (over OR under)

9.name: Dead Weight
9.desc: Winning team with the lowest scoring starting player

11.name: Thirty Flirty & Thriving
11.desc: Team with any starter closest to 30 points (over OR under)

12.name: Go Long
12.desc: Team with the Starting QB with the highest completion % (over 10 throws)

13.name: Coffee's For Closers
13.desc: Team that beats its opponent by the smallest margin of victory

14.name: TieBreaker
14.desc: Most Accrued Points from 2 randomly chosen positions
